description: Composition Red round neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, graphic print on the front with lettering and nike swoosh printed on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with like colours in cold water below 30 degrees, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo When you're in the mood to look casual and hip, try this red t-shirt from nike. You just cannot go wrong in this tee; with its clean silhouette and simple design, its the perfect every-day, every-where tee! Look at ease with yourself and the world as you pair it with jeans or shorts and walk around in style.
